description: User examines the list of tasks and sessions in the Figma prototype, moving the cursor over various items.
frame_description: The user is viewing a list of research opportunities in a mobile app prototype.

description: User switches from the prototype tab to the 'Askable Sessions' tab.
frame_description: The user clicks the browser tab for the session moderator tool.

description: The moderator prompt on the Askable Sessions page updates to a new instruction.
frame_description: The text on the screen changes from a question about filters to a prompt about opportunities.

description: User switches back to the Figma prototype tab to continue the task.
frame_description: The user returns to the mobile app prototype view.
